S.FORM: Bill Allison (William Allison) hiya ga m'engi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
Bill Allison (William Allison) hiya ga m'engi. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: βill allis~ɕon (william allis~ɕon) ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
